contentHtml:
Fall Tours

Sunday, August 9 at 1:00 pm or 2:30 pm
Sunday, September 6 at 1:00 pm

Prospective families are invited to tour Camp Barney Medintz to see our incredible facilities, learn about our limitless activities, and hear about the magic of camp! Meet our amazing staff and have all your questions answered. RSVP is required. Can’t attend a tour? Take a virtual tour!
contentText:
Fall Tours

Sunday, August 9 at 1:00 pm or 2:30 pm

Sunday, September 6 at 1:00 pm

Prospective families are invited to tour Camp Barney Medintz to see our incredible facilities, learn about our limitless activities, and hear about the magic of camp! Meet our amazing staff and have all your questions answered. RSVP is required. Can’t attend a tour? 
Take a virtual tour!
